inline_comments.message:
I'm not sure what this line is for. 
Is it necessary to have a hard-coded version here? 
This change was introduced in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ccsdk/oran.git;a=commit;h=685520fc0bd6f302c3ee99ddccc71618807b70a3 
Maybe Dan can comment?

Is this related to the error seen when merging https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ccsdk/oran/+/131328 ?

Errors: 
https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-oran-merge-verification-maven-master/109/
https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-oran-maven-merge-master/1004/

You can get rid of that hard-coded line now - it was needed because of an oddity in how maven handles ranges ...
The parent pom defines ccsdk.sli.version using the range (1.4.99999, 1.5.99999-SNAPSHOT] - which should include 1.5.0-SNAPSHOT, but it does not. The range works as expected after the first release build in that range - so it will work now as expected if you remove that hard-coded value
